## Collections.ReadOnlyResultMap class

A wrapper around an [IResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.iresultmap.md) which exposes only the readonly methods defined in the [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.ireadonlyresultmap.md) interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ReadOnlyResultMap<TK extends string = string, TV = unknown> implements IReadOnlyResultMap<TK, TV> 
```
**Implements:** [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.ireadonlyresultmap.md)<!-- -->&lt;TK, TV&gt;
